comment: 50yo male diagnostic + interventional radiologist with 25 years of occupational ionizing-radiation exposure (mixed fluoroscopy + CT-guided procedures), lifetime cumulative dose tracked per ALARA dosimetry records. No current radiation-attributable malignancy. Engine fires RF-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION via documented + ≥10-years branches and routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION-INTENSIFIED-SURVEILLANCE (CBC q1y for hematologic surveillance; thyroid ultrasound q3-5y; lifetime dose-equivalent review; ALARA / PPE counseling for active worker); alternative = IND-OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (routine general-population screening). Distinct from existing OCC-IONIZING-RADIATION-PREV-001 (48yo female technologist 22y) — different demographic, longer-duration, physician-occupation cohort.
